Name: Theme Setup
Notes: Umbrella task for theme.json, template parts, and templates. See PORTING.md -> Detail - Theme. Theme work is broken into the subtasks below.

Name: Design tokens (THM-tokens)
Notes: Map design tokens to theme.json settings (palette/type/spacing/layout). Do first - everything styled reads from it. Spec: PORTING.md THM-tokens.

Name: Core-block base styles (THM-coreblocks)
Notes: Core-block styles to theme.json styles.blocks.* (Elements tier). Spec: PORTING.md THM-coreblocks.

Name: Connect dept promo card (THM-btn-promo)
Notes: Core Button style variation (red, full-width, trailing arrow). Spec: PORTING.md THM-btn-promo.

Name: Berry decor (THM-berry)
Notes: Decorative theme style + asset, applied on homepage. Spec: PORTING.md THM-berry.

Name: Site header, UGA bar + masthead (PART-header)
Notes: Header template part: UGA global bar + masthead (BLK-brand + BLK-nav mega-menu + core Search). Depends on: BLK-brand, BLK-nav. Spec: PORTING.md PART-header.

Name: Site footer, CAES + UGA (PART-footer)
Notes: Footer template part: CAES footer (BLK-brand dark + core blocks) + BLK-uga-footer. Depends on: BLK-brand, BLK-uga-footer. Spec: PORTING.md PART-footer.

Name: Homepage (TPL-home)
Notes: Landing-page template; front page = a static Page edited in the normal editor. Spec: PORTING.md TPL-home.

Name: Interior-page template (TPL-interior)
Notes: Shared interior template (Academics landing, Interior page): locked breadcrumb + featured-image fade. Spec: PORTING.md TPL-interior.

Name: Interior + sidebar (TPL-interior-sidebar)
Notes: Interior template variant + sidebar rail (BLK-nav section-rail). Depends on: TPL-interior, BLK-nav. Spec: PORTING.md TPL-interior-sidebar.

Name: Degrees & Programs (TPL-programs-archive)
Notes: Unique archive template for the program CPT. Depends on: CPT-program. Spec: PORTING.md TPL-programs-archive.

Name: Program detail (TPL-program-single)
Notes: Single-program template + BLK-on-page-nav. Depends on: CPT-program. Spec: PORTING.md TPL-program-single.

Name: Directory (TPL-directory)
Notes: Unique template; faceted list via MOD-personnel. Spec: PORTING.md TPL-directory.

Name: Experts (TPL-experts)
Notes: Unique template; expertise view via MOD-personnel. Spec: PORTING.md TPL-experts.

Name: Announcement bar (PAT-announce)
Notes: Static pattern; dismiss behavior dropped. Spec: PORTING.md PAT-announce.

Name: Impact mosaic (PAT-mosaic)
Notes: Core-block pattern; CSS stretched-link + fade-up (no JS). Spec: PORTING.md PAT-mosaic.

Name: Read all about (PAT-read-about)
Notes: Static pattern. Spec: PORTING.md PAT-read-about.

Name: Phase cards (PAT-phase-cards)
Notes: Editor-filled pattern (tag/title/body). Spec: PORTING.md PAT-phase-cards.

Name: Info cards (PAT-info-cards)
Notes: Editor-filled pattern (title/copy/link). Spec: PORTING.md PAT-info-cards.

Name: FAQ (PAT-faq)
Notes: Core details block + pattern. Spec: PORTING.md PAT-faq.

Name: Closing CTA (PAT-closing-cta)
Notes: Static pattern. Spec: PORTING.md PAT-closing-cta.

Name: Brand / logo lockup (BLK-brand)
Notes: New uga-caes/brand; bundled logo enum (CAES/UGA/Extension); template-part only. Build before PART-header/PART-footer. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-brand.

Name: Navigation (BLK-nav)
Notes: New uga-caes/navigation; modes mega-menu/section-rail; template-part only. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-nav.

Name: Hero carousel (BLK-hero)
Notes: New uga-caes/hero-carousel; build as a carousel; model on caes-hub. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-hero.

Name: Feature tabs (BLK-feature-tabs)
Notes: New uga-caes/feature-tabs; synced panel swaps on select. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-feature-tabs.

Name: News (BLK-news)
Notes: New uga-caes/news; pulls from Field Report (mechanism TBD). Spec: PORTING.md BLK-news.

Name: UGA footer (BLK-uga-footer)
Notes: New uga-caes/uga-footer; migrate from caes-faculty-2023. Build before PART-footer. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-uga-footer.

Name: Interior section footer (BLK-section-footer)
Notes: New uga-caes/section-footer resolver block + synced pattern. Depends on: TPL-interior. Spec: PORTING.md BLK-section-footer.

Name: Scroll-spy subnav (BLK-on-page-nav)
Notes: New uga-caes/on-page-nav (sticky + active-link tracking). Spec: PORTING.md BLK-on-page-nav.

Name: Directory/Experts + profile cards (MOD-personnel)
Notes: Reuse/extend uga-caes/personnel: faceted lists + cards linking to Field Report. Additive only - live on other sites. Data source OPEN. Spec: PORTING.md MOD-personnel + modify-with-care.

Name: Program CPT, data model (CPT-program)
Notes: Register program CPT in the plugin. Field inventory in PORTING.md. Build before program templates. Spec: PORTING.md CPT-program.
